subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from before Bahá unto one among the handmaidens of God, that the melodies of her Lord may attract her and draw her nigh unto her Creator [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی البهاء الی امه من اماء الله لتجذبها نغمات ربها و تقربها الی موجدها
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
